given: Sentry span buffering receives spans with null attributes

should_find.finding: span buffer handling assumes span attributes are non-null, so spans with null attributes can crash or be processed incorrectly instead of being accepted safely

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix 8a40a128b581e8d311869b6574598347e097b581. span buffer handling assumes span attributes are non-null, so spans with null attributes can crash or be processed incorrectly instead of being accepted safely
